Document:
# Rule 8 - No hacking, exploiting, or using macros.
This rule should be self self-explenatory. Any external tool or program used to gain an advantage or modify the client in some way that gives you an advantage is not allowed.
## Precedents
- Don't use an external software to give yourself an unfair advantage over other players. - Don't modify your game client in a way that gives you an unfair advantage or for any malicious reasons. - Don't use macros, which are any scripts, programs, or in-built hardware features to automatically execute a series of inputs. - Don't use a bug to make yourself invulnerable in combat or otherwise give yourself an unfair advantage. - Don't intentionally lag or crash the server or other players. - Exceptions for external accessibility tools may be considered. If you need to use them, please run them by an admin.
